content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, the nitrogen atom at index 12 (N:12) is covalently bonded to the following neighbor atoms:

- **C:11** (Carbon, atom index 11)
- **C:13** (Carbon, atom index 13)
- **C:23** (Carbon, atom index 23)

The geomconf_index is **8573**.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 12 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
